title: SOP 3: Procedure for obtaining human samples
author: Esteban López, Marta
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
SOP 3: Procedure for obtaining human samples provides an overview of the general procedure for the collection of human samples in human biomonitoring studies and elaborates in detail on precautions to be taken in the pre-analytical phase for the matrices urine and blood. 
This document is also included as an annex in HBM4EU Deliverable D7.3.
steps_raw:
SOP 3: Procedure for obtaining human samples provides an overview of the general procedure for the collection of human samples in human biomonitoring studies and elaborates in detail on precautions to be taken in the pre-analytical phase for the matrices urine and blood. 
This document is also included as an annex in HBM4EU Deliverable D7.3.
